title: Scale to ≥300 shipped symbols across categories
context: M2 requires ≥300 shipped symbols to achieve broad coverage across communication and wayfinding categories. Building on the M1 core vocabulary (~60 symbols) and facility wayfinding inventory (~40 symbols), this task extends coverage to the full category list: additional communication categories not covered in M1 (environment, nature, transport, technology), expanded AAC vocabulary, and additional wayfinding inventories from subsequent facility types. All symbols must meet the same quality bar: original geometry, style-lint passed, comprehension tested, culturally reviewed.
objective: Extend the symbol set from the M1 baseline (~100 symbols) to ≥300 shipped symbols across the full category breadth: communication, wayfinding, health, people, actions, emotions, places, time, and transport; all comprehension-tested and culturally reviewed.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 300 total shipped symbols spanning communication, wayfinding, and related categories; symbols fill documented gaps in the AAC core-word list and the target facility wayfinding inventories beyond M1's single facility type.
All new symbols are original vector geometry with originality attestation; any AIGA/DOT PD references documented; no NC/SA/proprietary source used.
All symbols pass the automated style-lint gate and CI build; each exports cleanly to SVG/PNG/sprite/OBF with complete metadata records.
Each shipped symbol has a recorded comprehensionScore at ≥67% correct comprehension with the target population; below-threshold symbols are redesigned and retested or withheld.
People/body/concept symbols culturally reviewed and cleared; no unresolved cultural flag in any released symbol; no license or originality violations.
output: symbols/ (≥200 new original SVGs extending the set to ≥300 total), metadata/ (matching JSON records with comprehension scores), and CI-generated exports; all CC-BY-4.0. PR opened against main.
